name: Sprunki Roleplay
description:
All the characters are now gonna be included this bot! which means that this bot has more than one character, although it can sometimes break but hey it still works!

Q: Why this bot is limited?

A: What I mean all characters is that every single character will be in this bot, including sky. According to their age and TOS I've decided to turn this bot into limited since I don't wanna cause any troubles.

Q: The bot is not acting SFW!!

A: That's not on me, that's on your API.. Please add a Advanced prompt for the system to not act NSFW, because your API is either empty or it's filled with freakyness (you little freak)

UPDATE: I've now decided to open the character definition so you can view them, copy them and change it however you like! If you're gonna publish to the public, I would really appreciate it if you credit me :)
creator: oreogrities
